# Emberly

> Emberly is an open-source file sharing, URL shortening, and talent discovery platform.
> Built for developers, creators, and teams who value privacy, speed, and extensibility.

## What Emberly does

- Instant file uploads with direct CDN links, password protection, and configurable expiry
- Short URL creation with analytics, custom slugs, and vanity domains
- Custom domain support — map your own domain to your Emberly profile or short links
- Talent profiles (Nexium) — showcase skills, GitHub signals, and project portfolios
- Squad (team) collaboration — shared file buckets, member roles, and squad-scoped uploads
- Storage buckets — dedicated S3-compatible storage attached to a user or squad
- Open-source under the MIT licence — self-hostable with a single Docker image

## Key pages (publicly accessible)

- Home: https://embrly.ca/
- Pricing: https://embrly.ca/pricing
- Blog: https://embrly.ca/blog
- About: https://embrly.ca/about
- Changelogs: https://embrly.ca/changelogs
- Leaderboard: https://embrly.ca/leaderboard
- Discovery / Talent: https://embrly.ca/discovery
- Legal Hub: https://embrly.ca/legal
- Terms of Service: https://embrly.ca/legal/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://embrly.ca/legal/privacy

## Public REST API (no auth required)

- GET https://embrly.ca/api/health — service health check
- GET https://embrly.ca/api/status — live uptime / status
- GET https://embrly.ca/api/products — plan and pricing information
- GET https://embrly.ca/api/payments/promo-codes — active public discount codes
- GET https://embrly.ca/api/leaderboard — top contributors

## Optional: Further reading

- GitHub repository: https://github.com/EmberlyOSS/Emberly
- Discord community: https://embrly.ca/discord
- Contact: https://embrly.ca/contact
